reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, me permitieron cargar el cel sin la obligación de consumir, los baños y todas las unstalaciones impecables y hasta agua para el mate gratis, gracias!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They let me charge my cell phone without having to use any electricity. The bathrooms and all the facilities were impeccable, and they even provided free water for my mate. Thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaUtQYU13EAE
